buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors text-sm shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(234,88,12,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors text-sm
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors text-sm
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors text-sm

inputs.default: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.chat: bg-zinc-900/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/20 backdrop-blur-sm min-h-[60px] resize-none

cards.interactive: rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

sidebar.container: w-64 border-r bg-surface/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-surface/60 flex flex-col h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 z-40
sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md hover:bg-accent/50 hover:text-accent-foreground transition-colors group text-muted-foreground

chat.container: flex-1 flex flex-col h-screen ml-64 bg-background relative
chat.bubble_user: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[80%] self-end shadow-sm
chat.bubble_ai: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[80%] self-start font-mono text-sm leading-relaxed
chat.input_area: p-4 border-t bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60 sticky bottom-0 z-10

backgrounds.description: Nixie tube glow texture for empty state or welcome screen background

libraries.syntax_highlighting: react-syntax-highlighter (Dracula or Atom One Dark theme)

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Implement the 'Nixie Dark' theme in tailwind.config.js using the hex codes provided.
3. FONT: Import 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css.
4. LAYOUT: Create a SidebarLayout component that wraps the main content. The sidebar should be fixed.
5. CHAT: The chat interface is the core. It must be blazing fast. Use 'react-markdown' for AI responses with a custom code block renderer that uses 'react-syntax-highlighter'.
6. SETTINGS: Create a SettingsDialog using Radix UI Dialog primitive (or Shadcn Dialog). It should handle API keys securely.
7. AESTHETIC: Apply the 'grid_background' class to the main chat area to give it that engineering graph paper feel.
8. DARK MODE: Default to dark mode. Add a toggle in the sidebar, but optimize for dark first.
9. CRITICAL: Ensure the input box supports multi-line text (textarea) but handles 'Enter' to send (Shift+Enter for new line).
10. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, model-selector).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Avoid centering text unless it's a headline. Left-align for readability.
Ensure all buttons have active/hover states.
Code blocks must have a 'Copy' button.
